meaning: n.公用场地,温带之草木区
examples: The castle looks over private parkland.
Rising into the hills behind are 800 acres of parkland.
Its beautiful gardens and parkland are also open to the public.
In parkland close to the village, the imposing Howth Castle, home to the Gaisford-St.
But the parkland might be best known as the location for the 1970s hit TV show MASH.
